title: Using AI to outsmart drug-resistant bacteria
summary: Google DeepMind researchers led by Ben Luisi at Cambridge use AI tools including AlphaFold, Gemini, and Co-Scientist to identify bacterial defense mechanisms and accelerate antibiotic discovery against drug-resistant bacteria. The AI-driven approach compresses structural biology analysis from years to minutes.
